tier: Tier 4.33b - EOC C Runtime Source Audit
claim: Tier 4.33b verifies the edge-of-chaos mechanism is correctly integrated into the C runtime: PROFILE_EOC_RECURRENT defined in config.h, cra_eoc_init/update/get_summary implemented in state_manager.c with profile guard, eoc_recurrent profile added to Makefile with PROFILE_ID=7, host tests pass, and DTCM budget is 20KB at n=64 (w_rec 16KB + w_in 1KB + hidden 256B). Ready for EBRAINS package preparation.
caveat: Source audit only; not hardware build (spinnaker_tools not available locally), not EBRAINS execution, not a baseline freeze.
